# VU35KB - Amateur Radio Profile

> A curated resource for Amateur Radio (HAM), QRP operations, and technical explorations.

## Key Sections

- [Radio Journal](https://ham.srinikb.in/blog): Chronicling the journey of a newcomer in HAM radio, with technical updates and first-hand experiences.
- [Resource Library](https://ham.srinikb.in/resources): A knowledge base of technical manuals, operating procedures, and curated tools for radio communication.
- [Station Details](https://ham.srinikb.in/station): Technical specifications of the station, including current rig, license status, and grid locations.
- [Grid Explorer](https://ham.srinikb.in/grid): Interactive maidenhead grid square visualization for radio propagation analysis.

## Core Knowledge Areas

- **Operating Standards**: NATO Phonetic Alphabet, Voice Q-Codes, RST reporting, and standard contact procedures.
- **Station Infrastructure**: QRP rig setup (Baofeng M13 Pro), license grades (ASOC Restricted), and multi-location setups (Rajapalayam & Bangalore).
- **Tech Explorations**: Grid Square mathematics, station automation, and HAM radio digital tools.

## Meta
- **Callsign**: VU35KB
- **Location**: Rajapalayam, Tamil Nadu & Bangalore, Karnataka, IN
- **Grid Squares**: MJ89sk, MK82uu
- **Primary Domain**: https://ham.srinikb.in
- **Full Index**: https://ham.srinikb.in/llms-full.txt
